rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes","name":"pubkey","type":"bytes"},{"internalType":"bytes","name":"signature","type":"bytes"},{"internalType":"bytes","name":"message","type":"bytes"},{"internalType":"uint8","name":"algorithm","type":"uint8"}],"name":"pqVerify","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"valid","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"This precompile verifies ML-DSA-65 (Dilithium) and SLH-DSA-128s (SPHINCS+)      signatures natively on the Beam Subnet-EVM. It is stateless and read-only.      Algorithm IDs:        0 = ML-DSA-65   (NIST FIPS 204) \u2014 primary, lattice-based        1 = SLH-DSA-128s (NIST FIPS 205) \u2014 fallback, hash-based      Gas costs (benchmarked on Apple M1 Pro, 10x safety margin):        ML-DSA-65:    ~133,600 gas        SLH-DSA-128s: ~523,600 gas","kind":"dev","methods":{"pqVerify(bytes,bytes,bytes,uint8)":{"params":{"algorithm":"The PQ algorithm ID (0 = ML-DSA-65, 1 = SLH-DSA-128s)","message":"The message that was signed","pubkey":"The signer's public key (ML-DSA-65: 1952 bytes, SLH-DSA-128s: 32 bytes)","signature":"The signature to verify (ML-DSA-65: 3309 bytes, SLH-DSA-128s: 7856 bytes)"},"returns":{"valid":"True if the signature is valid, false otherwise"}}},"title":"IPQVerify \u2014 Post-Quantum Signature Verification Precompile","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"pqVerify(bytes,bytes,bytes,uint8)":{"notice":"Verify a post-quantum digital signature"}},"notice":"Interface for the PQ_VERIFY precompile deployed at 0x0000...0b00","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/IPQVerify.sol":"IPQVerify"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/IPQVerify.sol":{"keccak256":"0x16343fa7009a988f2318aa245aaa8fc7cfddf51e44555fb25f87d668094d3daa","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://669019f87321d87f1b38bf0f0a50efc9d3fa72dbb53a71373119b00e1522d38e","dweb:/ipfs/Qmd3eRpWdDRgN69UFDuQLYG8udD3WKq2d54AqKk7VpJZ3F"]}},"version":1}

params.algorithm: The PQ algorithm ID (0 = ML-DSA-65, 1 = SLH-DSA-128s)
params.pubkey: The signer's public key (ML-DSA-65: 1952 bytes, SLH-DSA-128s: 32 bytes)
params.signature: The signature to verify (ML-DSA-65: 3309 bytes, SLH-DSA-128s: 7856 bytes)

returns.valid: True if the signature is valid, false otherwise
